title: EQ - Tab is present in Device Settings
scenario: EQ tab is not displayed in Device Settings screen on supported Poly devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly device name to open Device Settings.
3. In the Device Settings screen, locate and tap on Audio Settings.
4. Within Audio Settings, verify that the Equalizer (EQ) tab is present and visible.
expected: The Equalizer (EQ) tab is present and visible in the Audio Settings section of Device Settings for a supported Poly device.
